prompt:
Asset type: imagegen automation batch, variant 05 of 15, target canvas 1792x1024
Primary request: Create a photorealistic editorial portrait of a fictional adult Korean female idol in her mid-20s, not resembling any real celebrity.
Scene/backdrop: rural summer bus stop beside a pale barley field outside Seoul, faded timetable board with no readable text, road heat shimmer, a low mountain line, empty bench.
Subject: adult Korean idol with soft natural charm, shoulder-length black hair blown sideways, calm faraway expression, slight squint in bright air.
Wardrobe/props: cream crochet cardigan over a pale pistachio cotton sundress with modest neckline, worn brown ankle boots, canvas bucket hat in hand, small portable fan resting on the bench, folded paper parasol leaning nearby.
Style/medium: Japanese negative film aesthetic, photorealistic natural editorial, nostalgic road-trip mood.
Composition/framing: wide landscape 16:9 portrait, full body standing just off the bench, one hand shading her eyes, plenty of faded sky and barley field negative space.
Lighting/mood: bright soft summer sunlight, slightly overexposed sky and field highlights, low contrast, muted faded colors, subtle grain.
Color palette: barley gold, cream crochet, pale pistachio, dusty road gray, soft brown.
Constraints: adult subject only, fictional likeness, no nudity, no explicit pose, no readable text, no logos, no watermark.
Avoid: rooftop edge, oversized white shirt, high-waisted shorts, cold glass bottle near neck or cheek, plastic bag prop, direct copy of the source prompt.
